scripts.build:python: source src/python/.venv/bin/activate && pyinstaller --clean --onefile --paths src/python/ --hidden-import=scapy --distpath=dist-python --specpath=dist-python --noconfirm src/python/scanner.py && pyinstaller --clean --onefile --paths src/python --distpath=dist-python --specpath=dist-python --noconfirm src/python/hostapd.py && pyinstaller --clean --onefile --paths src/python --distpath=dist-python --specpath=dist-python --noconfirm src/python/dnsmasq.py && pyinstaller --clean --onefile --paths src/python --distpath=dist-python --specpath=dist-python --noconfirm src/python/client_monitor.py && pyinstaller --clean --onefile --paths src/python --distpath=dist-python --specpath=dist-python --noconfirm src/python/scanner.py
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:python && npm run transpile:electron && npm run build:react && electron-builder --linux --x64
